headline: A Look At Camden Property Trust (CPT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Softness
summary: Camden Property Trust (CPT) stock has softened recently, with the price closing at $102.59 and total return down over the past year and past 3 months. This has put renewed focus on its income and valuation profile. See our latest analysis for Camden Property Trust. The recent softening in Camden Property Trust’s share price, with a 90 day share price return down 5.47% and year to date share price return down 6.88%, contrasts with a 3 year total shareholder return of 8.19%. This suggests that...
